name_cn:
.🌷【New】Gucci Blondie Mini Shoulder Bag
The new Gucci Blondie handbag features the brand's classic series logo, which first appeared in the early 1970s, cleverly combining heritage charm with contemporary style, perfectly interpreting the brand's classic design and modern essence. This mini shoulder bag is crafted from beige and dark brown Original GG canvas, featuring an adjustable shoulder strap.
Model: 815700.
Size: 21.5(L) x 11(H) x 8cm(D).
Color: Canvas cork leather/Original leather.
Made in Italy
